void_admiral.name: Void Admiral
void_admiral.description: Space-branch focus: unlocks orbital-doctrine research reserved for a chosen space leader.

ground_marshal.name: Ground Marshal
ground_marshal.description: Ground-branch focus: unlocks planetary-warfare research for a chosen ground leader.

wing_commander.name: Wing Commander
wing_commander.description: Squadron-branch focus: unlocks carrier-doctrine research for a chosen squadron leader.

missile_chief.name: Missile Chief
missile_chief.description: Missile-branch focus: unlocks strategic-ordnance research for a chosen missile leader.

polymath.name: Polymath
polymath.description: Generalist: grants an extra concurrent research slot instead of a branch focus.
